title: Dungeon Train: A Lore-Rich Roguelite Adventure
description: Adventure time inspired dungeon crawler on a train. Procedurally generated carriages. Rich narrative, with custom made mods for a completely unique experience.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_-YP7r6wNO8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Dungeon Train is an _in development_  Dungeon Crawler set on a train with infinite procedurally generated carriages.

Inspired by an [episode of adventure time](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l9ILza1b7YA), where Fin and Jake find themselves on an infinite train battling enemies and collecting loot from carriage to carriage. 

A never-ending train moving through the world, on a never-ending track. Jump on or off as your please while you explore the carraiges, and stores left behind by preivous passangers.

This project is very much actively in development, and is looking for feedback, ideas and encouragement. Please join the discord to engage with me directly! I always prefer to look to my gamer community for direction, and try to implment suggests quickly.

--
A new project, by the developer of Dungeon Tain VR: https://brennanhatton.itch.io/dungeontrain
Special thanks to Dungeon Train VR Community for the support over the years. 
Screenshot thanks to discord: @koli_drath
Join the Dungeon Train community on discord.
